title: senecio incanus subsp. persoonii
intro: Senecio incanus subsp. persoonii, also known as 'Persoon's woolly groundsel,' is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the daisy family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Senecio incanus subsp. persoonii is often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
